prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of REGN, the stock typically exhibits an annualized volatility of approximately 35-40%. For a 20-day period, this translates to roughly 10-12% price movement potential. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum given biotech sector fundamentals. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with estimated daily volatility of 2.2%, scaled for 20 days. Wider intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over longer time horizons and potential market volatility affecting biotech stocks.
